items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of processing time between steps.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding the 'Time between steps (processing time)'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the processing time between the steps of the service. The existing evidence primarily focuses on the booking process without addressing the specific timing requirements, leading to an inconclusive judgment.
